group.value: Group C — opponents Morocco, Haiti, Scotland

manager.value: Carlo Ancelotti (took over 2025; first non-Brazilian to coach Brazil at a World Cup)

recent_form.value: Chasing a first World Cup title since 2002; Raphinha arrives in form after a strong season at La Liga champions Barcelona

wc_role.value: Five-time champions and contender; seeking a record-extending 6th title and first since 2002

key_players.value: Vinícius Júnior, Raphinha, Bruno Guimarães, Marquinhos, Alisson (GK), Neymar (recalled at 34 after ~2.5-year international absence)

squad_news.value: Ancelotti named the 26-man squad on 18 May 2026; recalled Neymar after a ~2.5-year national-team absence; left out veteran Thiago Silva, plus Richarlison and João Pedro; Rodrygo and Estêvão miss out through injury.

wc2026_match1.value: Stumbled to a 1-1 draw vs Morocco in their WC2026 opener (13 Jun, MetLife) under Ancelotti. Fell behind to Saibari (21'); Vinicius Junior rescued a point (32'). Casemiro and Ibanez booked; Brazil pressed late (Paqueta, Raphinha) but Bounou held firm. Dropped points to Africa's 2022 semifinalists in game one.
